title: Claude Voice Mode Finally Uses Opus: From Casual Q&A to a Real-Time Advisor That Can Call Tools and Switch Languages
excerpt: Some challenges can't be solved just by typing. Today, Anthropic made a key upgrade to Claude's voice mode—it no longer runs only the lightweight Haiku model, b
content_html:
Some challenges can't be solved just by typing. Today, Anthropic made a key upgrade to Claude's voice mode—it no longer runs only the lightweight Haiku model, but can now run on three models: Claude Opus, Claude Sonnet, and Claude Haiku. It also connects to tools like Gmail and Slack, and supports more languages.

This update has a reason. Earlier this year, after Claude added hands-free conversation, people quickly used the voice mode for more complex scenarios—longer conversations where they used speech instead of typing to tackle real business problems. But at that time, the voice mode only ran on Haiku, chosen for speed. The conversation was indeed fast, but often not deep enough. Now, Opus and Sonnet, designed to solve tough problems, have entered the voice mode. Users can switch models anytime using the model selector during the conversation; the voice mode will choose the fastest version of the selected model, keeping the conversation smooth, and it will default to the model you last used in text chats—so you can switch between voice and text without starting over.

With stronger models, you can now speak out ideas that are not yet fully formed, and let Claude help you develop real insights. It will ask questions, extend your thoughts, rather than give a standard answer. The voice mode works with take turns: Claude listens first, pauses to think, and then responds. Anthropic provides several scenarios worth trying—practice an important conversation and ask it to evaluate your communication style, organize a client proposal and have it identify logical flaws, brainstorm a product roadmap and ask it to do competitive research to validate, or ask it to help you evaluate different hypotheses for why "that video went viral."

Once you know what you want to do, you can let Claude execute it. If you're running late, ask it to reschedule a meeting on Google Calendar by 30 minutes; turn a client proposal conversation directly into a document in Canva; ask it to summarize today's emails and draft responses for the most important ones. Before using connected tools, Claude will request permission. New tools can be added in "Settings > Connectors" on mobile, desktop, or web.

In terms of language, voice mode now supports more languages across all plans. You can talk to it in the language you think in, and you can switch languages during the conversation. However, Claude won't automatically detect the language—you need to verbally request it or manually select it in the voice settings. Also, the language for the voice mode needs to be set separately, and previous language preferences won't be automatically carried over.

This update is now available in beta for all chat users on mobile, desktop, and web, but the experience is best on mobile. Free plans can use Haiku, one connected tool, and all supported languages; paid plans can access more models and all connected tools, and voice conversations count toward regular usage limits. Tap the sound wave icon in the Claude mobile app to start chatting.

sentences.en: Some challenges can't be solved just by typing.
sentences.zh: 有些挑战不能仅通过打字来解决。

sentences.en: It also connects to tools like Gmail and Slack, and supports more languages.
sentences.zh: 它还连接到 Gmail 和 Slack 等工具，并支持更多语言。

sentences.zh: 这次更新是有原因的。

sentences.en: Earlier this year, after Claude added hands-free conversation, people quickly used the voice mode for more complex scenarios—longer conversations where they used speech instead of typing to tackle real business problems.
sentences.zh: 今年早些时候，克劳德添加了免提通话功能后，人们很快将语音模式用于更复杂的场景——更长的对话，他们使用语音而不是打字来解决实际的业务问题。

sentences.en: But at that time, the voice mode only ran on Haiku, chosen for speed.

sentences.zh: 现在，旨在解决棘手问题的Opus和Sonnet已经进入了语音模式。

sentences.zh: 用户在对话过程中可以随时使用模型选择器切换模型；语音模式将选择所选模型的最快版本，保持对话顺利，并且它将默认为您上次在文本聊天中使用的模型，因此您可以在语音和文本之间切换而无需重新开始。

sentences.en: With stronger models, you can now speak out ideas that are not yet fully formed, and let Claude help you develop real insights.
sentences.zh: 有了更强大的模型，你现在可以说出尚未完全形成的想法，并让 Claude 帮助你发展真正的见解。

sentences.en: It will ask questions, extend your thoughts, rather than give a standard answer.
sentences.zh: 它会提出问题，扩展你的想法，而不是给出标准答案。

sentences.en: The voice mode works with take turns: Claude listens first, pauses to think, and then responds.
sentences.zh: 语音模式采用轮流工作：克劳德先听，暂停思考，然后做出回应。

sentences.en: Anthropic provides several scenarios worth trying—practice an important conversation and ask it to evaluate your communication style, organize a client proposal and have it identify logical flaws, brainstorm a product roadmap and ask it to do competitive research to validate, or ask it to help you evaluate different hypotheses for why "that video went viral."
sentences.zh: Anthropic 提供了几种值得尝试的场景——练习一次重要的对话并要求它评估你的沟通风格，组织一份客户提案并让它识别逻辑缺陷，集思广益制定产品路线图并要求它进行竞争性研究来验证，或者要求它帮助你评估不同的假设，以了解“该视频为何如此火爆”。

blocks.html_en: Once you know what you want to do, you can let Claude execute it. Before using connected tools, Claude will request permission. New tools can be added in "Settings > Connectors" on mobile, desktop, or web.

sentences.en: Once you know what you want to do, you can let Claude execute it.
sentences.zh: 一旦你知道你想做什么，你就可以让克劳德执行它。

sentences.en: If you're running late, ask it to reschedule a meeting on Google Calendar by 30 minutes; turn a client proposal conversation directly into a document in Canva; ask it to summarize today's emails and draft responses for the most important ones.
sentences.zh: 如果您迟到了，请要求其在 Google 日历上将会议重新安排 30 分钟；将客户提案对话直接转换为 Canva 中的文档；要求它总结今天的电子邮件并起草最重要电子邮件的回复。

sentences.en: Before using connected tools, Claude will request permission.
sentences.zh: 在使用连接的工具之前，克劳德会请求许可。

sentences.en: New tools can be added in "Settings > Connectors" on mobile, desktop, or web.
sentences.zh: 可以在移动设备、桌面设备或网络上的“设置 > 连接器”中添加新工具。

blocks.html_en: In terms of language, voice mode now supports more languages across all plans. You can talk to it in the language you think in, and you can switch languages during the conversation. However, Claude won't automatically detect the language—you need to verbally request it or manually select it in the voice settings. Also, the language for the voice mode needs to be set separately, and previous language preferences won't be automatically carried over.

sentences.en: In terms of language, voice mode now supports more languages across all plans.
sentences.zh: 在语言方面，语音模式现在支持所有计划中的更多语言。

sentences.en: You can talk to it in the language you think in, and you can switch languages during the conversation.
sentences.zh: 你可以用你想用的语言与它交谈，并且可以在对话过程中切换语言。

sentences.en: However, Claude won't automatically detect the language—you need to verbally request it or manually select it in the voice settings.
sentences.zh: 但是，Claude 不会自动检测语言 - 您需要口头请求或在语音设置中手动选择。

sentences.en: Also, the language for the voice mode needs to be set separately, and previous language preferences won't be automatically carried over.
sentences.zh: 此外，语音模式的语言需要单独设置，并且之前的语言偏好不会自动延续。

blocks.html_en: This update is now available in beta for all chat users on mobile, desktop, and web, but the experience is best on mobile. Free plans can use Haiku, one connected tool, and all supported languages; paid plans can access more models and all connected tools, and voice conversations count toward regular usage limits. Tap the sound wave icon in the Claude mobile app to start chatting.

sentences.en: This update is now available in beta for all chat users on mobile, desktop, and web, but the experience is best on mobile.
sentences.zh: 此更新现已推出测试版，适用于移动设备、桌面设备和网络上的所有聊天用户，但移动设备上的体验最佳。

sentences.en: Free plans can use Haiku, one connected tool, and all supported languages; paid plans can access more models and all connected tools, and voice conversations count toward regular usage limits.
sentences.zh: 免费计划可以使用 Haiku（一种连接工具）和所有支持的语言；付费计划可以访问更多模型和所有连接的工具，并且语音对话会计入常规使用限制。

sentences.en: Tap the sound wave icon in the Claude mobile app to start chatting.
sentences.zh: 点击克劳德移动应用程序中的声波图标即可开始聊天。

content_html_zh:
有些挑战不能仅通过打字来解决。 今天，Anthropic 对 Claude 的语音模式进行了关键升级——不再只运行轻量级 Haiku 模型，而是现在可以运行在 Claude Opus、Claude Sonnet 和 Claude Haiku 三种模型上。 它还连接到 Gmail 和 Slack 等工具，并支持更多语言。

这次更新是有原因的。 今年早些时候，克劳德添加了免提通话功能后，人们很快将语音模式用于更复杂的场景——更长的对话，他们使用语音而不是打字来解决实际的业务问题。 但当时，语音模式只运行俳句，是为了速度而选择的。 谈话确实很快，但往往不够深入。 现在，旨在解决棘手问题的Opus和Sonnet已经进入了语音模式。 用户在对话过程中可以随时使用模型选择器切换模型；语音模式将选择所选模型的最快版本，保持对话顺利，并且它将默认为您上次在文本聊天中使用的模型，因此您可以在语音和文本之间切换而无需重新开始。

有了更强大的模型，你现在可以说出尚未完全形成的想法，并让 Claude 帮助你发展真正的见解。 它会提出问题，扩展你的想法，而不是给出标准答案。 语音模式采用轮流工作：克劳德先听，暂停思考，然后做出回应。 Anthropic 提供了几种值得尝试的场景——练习一次重要的对话并要求它评估你的沟通风格，组织一份客户提案并让它识别逻辑缺陷，集思广益制定产品路线图并要求它进行竞争性研究来验证，或者要求它帮助你评估不同的假设，以了解“该视频为何如此火爆”。

一旦你知道你想做什么，你就可以让克劳德执行它。 如果您迟到了，请要求其在 Google 日历上将会议重新安排 30 分钟；将客户提案对话直接转换为 Canva 中的文档；要求它总结今天的电子邮件并起草最重要电子邮件的回复。 在使用连接的工具之前，克劳德会请求许可。 可以在移动设备、桌面设备或网络上的“设置 > 连接器”中添加新工具。

在语言方面，语音模式现在支持所有计划中的更多语言。 你可以用你想用的语言与它交谈，并且可以在对话过程中切换语言。 但是，Claude 不会自动检测语言 - 您需要口头请求或在语音设置中手动选择。 此外，语音模式的语言需要单独设置，并且之前的语言偏好不会自动延续。

此更新现已推出测试版，适用于移动设备、桌面设备和网络上的所有聊天用户，但移动设备上的体验最佳。 免费计划可以使用 Haiku（一种连接工具）和所有支持的语言；付费计划可以访问更多模型和所有连接的工具，并且语音对话会计入常规使用限制。 点击克劳德移动应用程序中的声波图标即可开始聊天。
